api_key.created.description: API key created; records name, prefix, scopes, expiry — never the plaintext.

api_key.rotate.description: API key rotated to a new key id; old key retained for a grace period.

audit.chain_verified.description: Audit chain verification endpoint was invoked.

audit.deadletter_aged.description: Audit deadletter retention reaper dropped rows older than the configured AUDIT_DLQ_MAX_AGE_DAYS window; reason carries the trigger (e.g. max_age_exceeded).

audit.deadletter_dropped.description: Admin operator permanently dropped a deadletter entry, accepting data loss.

audit.deadletter_read.description: Admin operator listed audit deadletter queue entries. Filter records the serialized query params with any secret-shaped values redacted.

audit.deadletter_replayed.description: Admin operator manually replayed a deadletter entry into the audit chain; DLQ row deleted on success.

audit.export_cap_updated.description: Admin operator updated the per-project audit export row cap. old_cap and new_cap are BIGINT values; 0 denotes inherit-from-default.

audit.export_capped.description: Audit export terminated early due to row cap.

audit.exported.description: Audit log exported by a caller with audit:export scope.

audit.key_rotated.description: Audit HMAC signing key rotation; writes a forensic anchor row that boundary-stitches the chain across epochs.

audit.retention_trimmed.description: Retention reaper trimmed old audit rows; writes a tombstone anchor row giving positive forensic proof of the trim (count, cutoff, and chain tail at trim time).

audit.retention_updated.description: Admin operator updated the per-project audit retention window (days). 0 disables retention trimming for the project; a negative value is rejected at the API layer.

auth.internal_secret_bypass.description: Project-scoped handler entered via X-Internal-Secret without a project context. gate names the skipped check, caller is the sender identity (api-key:<id> or 'unknown'), handler names the entry point.

auth.run_token.rejected.description: SDK run-token authentication rejected before run-scoped API access.

cron.paused_quota.description: Cron jobs paused automatically because the org's quota was exceeded.

cron.resumed_quota.description: Cron jobs resumed automatically at the start of a new billing period after quota reset.

device_code.approved.description: CLI device code approved; a new API key is issued.

endpoint.set.description: Job HTTP endpoint URL updated; a fresh HMAC signing secret was generated.

endpoint.verified.description: Signed test ping sent to the job endpoint; result recorded.

environment.created.description: Environment created. Variable keys only are recorded, never values.

event.sent.description: Event sent to a waiting trigger.

event.sent_by_prefix.description: Events sent to all triggers matching a key prefix.

event_source.dispatched.description: Event dispatched to subscribers (hot path, async audit).

event_source.subscribed.description: Target subscribed to an event source.

job.bulk_triggered.description: Bulk job triggering (hot path, async audit).

job.cloned.description: Job cloned from an existing definition.

job.triggered.description: Job run triggered via API (hot path, async audit).

job_group.paused_all.description: Every job in a group paused.

job_group.resumed_all.description: Every job in a group resumed.

jobs.exported.description: Job definitions exported as a stream.

log_drain.created.description: Log drain created. Endpoint host only, auth config redacted.

permission.granted.description: Role assigned to a member (permission grant).

permission.revoked.description: Role removed from a member (permission revocation).

project_settings.updated.description: Project-level settings updated (default region, key lifetime, etc.).

quota.exceeded.description: Org exceeded its quota; cron jobs paused until the next billing period.

role.system_seeded.description: System roles seeded for a project.

run.bulk_cancelled.description: Bulk run cancellation by explicit id list.

run.idempotency_key_reset.description: Run idempotency key reset so the same key can be reused.

runs.exported.description: Job run history exported as a stream.

secret.created.description: Secret created. Key name only; never the value.

secret.read.description: Single secret metadata read (never the decrypted value).

subscription.changed.description: Org subscription changed (plan upgrade, downgrade, or renewal).

usage.threshold_reached.description: Org crossed an 80%, 90%, or 100% threshold of a metered quota in the current billing period. Emitted at most once per (org, metric, threshold) per period.

webhook.tested.description: Webhook URL tested. Host only, never full URL or secret.

worker.delete.acked.description: Worker force-disconnect request was acknowledged by the worker-plane replica.

worker.delete.timeout.description: Worker force-disconnect request timed out waiting for worker-plane acknowledgement.

worker.force_disconnected.description: Worker force-disconnected by operator or revocation broadcast.

worker.task_routed.description: Worker-mode run routed to a connected gRPC worker.

workflow.cloned.description: Workflow cloned from an existing definition.

workflow.triggered.description: Workflow run triggered (hot path, async audit).

workflow.updated_breaking.description: Workflow updated with a breaking change while active runs exist on the previous version.

workflow_run.retried.description: Workflow run retried into a new run id.

workflow_run.subtree_replayed.description: Workflow subtree replayed from a specific step.

workflow_step.force_completed.description: Workflow step force-completed by an operator.

workflows.exported.description: Workflow definitions exported as a stream.
